taxonomy: Tridentea marientalensis belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a species of flowering plant within the genus Tridentea. Tridentea marientalensis is native to Namibia and is characterized by its unique, fleshy leaves. The plant is part of the subfamily Asclepiadoideae within the Apocynaceae family. Further classification details may vary based on recent research and updates in botanical taxonomy.
